choices: A case statement does not cover all inputs or lacks a default
The wave file is too large
items.explain: Incomplete case coverage is a common lint family.

choices: Problems may be hidden—you are not seeing warnings
items.explain: BLIND hides issues; CLEAN surfaces them.

items.prompt: The preferred response to a WIDTH warning is…
choices: Fix the RTL width or casting—not only blanket -Wno
Force signals in the wave viewer

items.prompt: Warnings-as-errors is a policy choice that only works if the tree is actually clean.
items.explain: Werror forces zero tolerance once you can sustain it.
